name: Triple-Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Semisweet Chocolate, chopped into small pieces
9 ounces Milk Chocolate, chopped into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a six-quart Dutch oven, combine sugar, salt, butter, and milk.
2. Bring mixture to a simmer over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Continue cooking until the first bubble forms.
4. Boil the mixture for exactly eight minutes.
5. Remove from heat immediately and stir in the remaining ingredients.
6. Blend thoroughly.
7. Pour the mixture into two oiled 13 x 9 inch pans.
8. Cover with foil and refrigerate until firm.
9. Slice as desired before serving.
10. Allow to come to room temperature for best flavor before serving.
11. Store in the refrigerator or freezer.
